chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-498 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 21.05.2025 Mr. Imdad Ali Mashori, Advocate for the Petitioner a/w Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh a/w Hamid Ali Abro, Assistant Accountant, District Accounts Office, Larkana and Abdul Jabbar Bhutto, Focal Person to DEO Primary, Larkana. ------ The Assistant Accountant, District Accounts Office, Larkano files Pension Roll Slip for the month of May, 2025, issued in favour of petitioner, taken on record. He submits that the pension shall be credited in the account of the petitioner on or before 1st June, 2025. As far as her gratuity and G.P.Fund are concerned, same shall be paid to her within one week’s time, whereas Group Insurance shall be paid by the Finance Department, after approaching the concerned department. When confronted, counsel for the petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition, which is not opposed by the other side. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Manzoor
